name: lpg
title: OCI Transit — Local Peering Gateways
summary: Creates LPG pairs for same-region VCN peering — one gateway in each VCN, connected by setting `peer_id` on side A.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: compartment_id
module.description: OCID of the compartment for the LPGs.

module.name: peerings
module.type: map(object({ vcn_a_id = string vcn_b_id = string lpg_a_route_table_id = optional(string) lpg_b_route_table_id = optional(string) }))
module.description: Map of same-region VCN peering pairs keyed by logical name. Two LPGs are created per pair (one in each VCN) and connected by setting peer_id on side A. Both VCNs must be reachable by the configured provider identity (cross-tenancy LPG peering requires IAM policy + provider aliases — out of scope). VCN CIDRs must not overlap.

outputs.name: connection_ids
outputs.description: Map of '<peering-key>/a' and '<peering-key>/b' to LPG OCIDs. Use these as route-rule network entities in each VCN's route tables.

outputs.name: peering_status
outputs.description: Map of logical peering name to the side-A peering status (PEERED when established).

outputs.name: peer_advertised_cidrs
outputs.description: Map of logical peering name to the CIDR advertised by the peer (side A's view).
